ForEach.name: ForEach
ForEach.xaml_template:
<sa:ForEach x:TypeArguments="x:Object" DisplayName="For Each">

  <sa:ForEach.Body>

    <ActivityAction x:TypeArguments="x:Object">

      <ActivityAction.Argument>

        <DelegateInArgument x:TypeArguments="x:Object" Name="item" />

      </ActivityAction.Argument>

      <Sequence DisplayName="Body" />

    </ActivityAction>

  </sa:ForEach.Body>

</sa:ForEach>

TryCatch.name: TryCatch
TryCatch.xaml_template:
<sa:TryCatch DisplayName="Try Catch">

  <sa:TryCatch.Try>

    <Sequence DisplayName="Try" />

  </sa:TryCatch.Try>

  <sa:TryCatch.Catches>

    <sa:Catch x:TypeArguments="x:Exception">

      <sa:Catch.Action>

        <ActivityAction x:TypeArguments="x:Exception">

          <ActivityAction.Argument>

            <DelegateInArgument x:TypeArguments="x:Exception" Name="exception" />

          </ActivityAction.Argument>

          <Sequence DisplayName="Catch" />

        </ActivityAction>

      </sa:Catch.Action>

    </sa:Catch>

  </sa:TryCatch.Catches>

  <sa:TryCatch.Finally>

    <Sequence DisplayName="Finally" />

  </sa:TryCatch.Finally>

</sa:TryCatch>

BuildDataTable.name: BuildDataTable
BuildDataTable.xaml_template:
<ui:BuildDataTable DataTable="{x:Null}" TableInfo="<NewDataSet>
  <xs:schema id="NewDataSet" xmlns="" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:msdata="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:xml-msdata">
    <xs:element name="NewDataSet" msdata:IsDataSet="true" msdata:MainDataTable="TableName" msdata:UseCurrentLocale="true">
      <xs:complexType>
        <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
          <xs:element name="TableName">
            <xs:complexType>
              <xs:sequence>
                <xs:element name="Column1" minOccurs="0">
                  <xs:simpleType>
                    <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
                      <xs:maxLength value="100" />
                    </xs:restriction>
                  </xs:simpleType>
                </xs:element>
                <xs:element name="Column2" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0" />
              </xs:sequence>
            </xs:complexType>
          </xs:element>
        </xs:choice>
      </xs:complexType>
    </xs:element>
  </xs:schema>
  <TableName>
    <Column1>text</Column1>
    <Column2>1</Column2>
  </TableName>
</NewDataSet>" />
